detaileddescription.para: Host name or IP address of the Tryll server. Defaults to localhost.
TCP port the Tryll server is listening on (default: 9100).
Fired when a RequestModel sequence terminates (load succeeded, or fallback download+load succeeded, or any step failed). bSuccess is the final outcome.
Broadcast when a ToolCallNode detects a tool call with notify_client enabled.
Broadcast when a ClassifyIntentNode emits an intent on its "found" path with notify_client enabled.
Broadcast for any NodeEvent whose event_type has no typed delegate (or whose typed delegate has no subscribers). Untyped fallback.

briefdescription.para: True when ConfigureSession was last called with bAllowAutoModelDownloading=true.
True between a successful ConfigureSession and disconnect / reconfigure-failure.

detaileddescription.para: Open a TCP session to ServerHost:ServerPort. Asynchronous — completion is reported via OnConnectionChanged(bConnected=true). Errors fire OnError. Calling Connect() while already connected is a no-op.
Close the active session. OnConnectionChanged(bConnected=false) fires once the socket is down.
True while the background connection is in the Connected state.
Server-assigned session id, or 0 when not connected.

memberdef.argsstring: (ETryllInferenceEngine Engine, bool bAllowAutoModelDownloading=false, FString GameName=TEXT(""), ETryllInferenceEngine SttEngine=ETryllInferenceEngine::Mock, ETryllInferenceEngine TtsEngine=ETryllInferenceEngine::Mock, ETryllInferenceEngine EmbeddingEngine=ETryllInferenceEngine::Mock, FString StorageDataFolder=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: ConfigureSession

detaileddescription.para: Send ConfigureSessionRequest. Must be called after Connected and before CreateAgent. Result is delivered via OnConfigureSessionComplete delegate.

parameterdescription.para: Inference backend to use for this session.

When true, CreateAgent automatically downloads any missing models referenced by the graph instead of failing immediately. Intended for development and prototyping only. Pass UTryllRuntimeSettings::bAllowAutoModelDownloading to drive this from the project settings asset.

Integration identifier for telemetry grouping (e.g. "tryll-roleplay-demo"). Leave empty to omit; the server defaults to "unknown" when telemetry is on. Pass UTryllRuntimeSettings::GameName to drive this from the project settings asset.
Project-relative storage root (e.g. UTryllRuntimeSettings::StorageDataFolder) or an absolute path. Resolved to a full path on the wire. Empty = server default storage root.

detaileddescription.para: Configure the session from project settings (UTryllRuntimeSettings): engine selections, model auto-download, game name, and storage folder.

This is the "use settings" path. It runs automatically once connected when UTryllRuntimeSettings::bAutoConfigureSession is true; call it yourself if you connected with that flag disabled and still want the settings-driven config. To override settings, call ConfigureSession() with explicit parameters instead.

True once the current connection has a successfully configured session (ConfigureSession completed OK). Agent / VoiceInput creation must wait for this — creating against an unconfigured session is rejected by the server.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FTryllGraphDescription &Graph, TFunction< FTryllOnAgentCreated > OnComplete, bool bEnableDiagnostics=false)
memberdef.name: RequestCreateAgent

detaileddescription.para:
Begin create-agent; completion is delivered via OnComplete on the game thread.
Graph
Workflow graph description to send to the server.
bEnableDiagnostics
When true the server populates TurnComplete.debug_info.
Queue destroy for the given agent.
List models available for the session's inference engine.
Start downloading a model. Progress is broadcast via OnDownloadProgress; completion via OnDownloadComplete.
Pin a model into memory on the server (LoadAndPin). Completion is broadcast via OnLoadModelComplete.
Demote a pinned model to on-demand and evict it if no contexts hold it. Completion is broadcast via OnUnloadModelComplete.

Ensure a model is loaded and pinned. Tries LoadModel first; if the model is not present on disk the subsystem falls back to DownloadModel and retries the load. Single completion event: OnModelReady(name, bSuccess).

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &Name, const TArray< FString > &Strings, TFunction< FTryllOnStringStorage > OnComplete=nullptr)
memberdef.name: RequestCreateStringStorage

detaileddescription.para: Create a named StringStorage on the server from an inline string array. Completion is broadcast via OnCreateStringStorageComplete.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &Name, const FString &FilePath, uint8 Kind=0, TFunction< FTryllOnStringStorage > OnComplete=nullptr)
memberdef.name: RequestCreateStringStorageFromFile

detaileddescription.para:
Create a named StringStorage on the server from a server-side file path.
Kind
0=List (default), 1=Map, 2=Multimap. When Kind is Map or Multimap the file must be a JSON array of {id, text} objects. Completion is broadcast via OnCreateStringStorageComplete.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &Name, const TArray< FString > &Keys, const TArray< FString > &Values, uint8 Kind=1, TFunction< FTryllOnStringStorage > OnComplete=nullptr)
memberdef.name: RequestCreateStringStorageKeyed

detaileddescription.para:
Create a named StringStorage on the server from inline key/value pairs.
Kind
1=Map (default; keys must be unique), 2=Multimap (duplicate keys allowed). Completion is broadcast via OnCreateStringStorageComplete.
Destroy a named StringStorage on the server. Nodes that already hold the storage are unaffected.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &Name, const FString &ConfigPath, const FString &EmbeddingModel=FString{}, TFunction< FTryllOnEmbeddedStorageCreated > OnComplete=nullptr)
memberdef.name: RequestCreateEmbeddedStringStorage

detaileddescription.para: Create an EmbeddedStringStorage from a server-side *.fig.json. Path A: config file + optional embeddingModel override.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &Name, const TArray< FString > &Strings, const FString &EmbeddingModel, TFunction< FTryllOnEmbeddedStorageCreated > OnComplete=nullptr)
memberdef.name: RequestCreateEmbeddedStringStorageFromStrings

detaileddescription.para: Create an EmbeddedStringStorage from inline strings. Path B: requires EmbeddingModel.
Destroy a named EmbeddedStringStorage on the server. Nodes that already hold the storage are unaffected.
Create a server-side VoiceInput (STT) handle. Completion is delivered via OnComplete on the game thread with a TSharedPtr<FTryllVoiceInput> on success.
Queue destroy for the given VoiceInput handle.
<PluginBaseDir>/Binaries/ThirdParty/TryllServer; empty if the plugin is not found.
Variant subfolders (Default/Release) whose target resolves on disk.
Server exe to launch for Preferred; see .cpp for the editor/packaged resolution.

Game-instance subsystem: one TCP session to the Tryll server. Manages the socket connection on a background thread (FTryllConnection) and drains the event queue on Tick(), dispatching to registered agents and delegates.

Default (zero-wiring) path — driven by UTryllRuntimeSettings:
bAutoLaunchServer → spawns the bundled tryll_server.exe on Initialize.
bAutoConnect → Connect() on Initialize (connect-retry covers server startup).
bAutoConfigureSession → on Connected, ConfigureSessionFromSettings() applies the Engine / Stt / Tts / Embedding selections from settings. UTryllAgentComponent / UTryllVoiceInputComponent then create themselves once IsSessionReady() — they queue until OnConfigureSessionComplete if they spawn earlier. So the common case is: add the components, pick engines in Project Settings, press play.

Manual path — turn those flags off to drive the session yourself:
Connect() — open TCP session to ServerHost:ServerPort.
OnConnectionChanged(bConnected=true) — bind to continue; or poll IsConnected().
ConfigureSession(Engine, ...) — configure explicitly (overrides settings). Completion arrives on OnConfigureSessionComplete; IsSessionReady() is true thereafter.
CreateAgent — attach a UTryllAgentComponent (auto-creates once the session is ready) or call RequestCreateAgent().
SendMessage(Text) — drive one turn; chunks on OnAnswerText, the turn ends with OnTurnComplete(Status).
RequestDestroyAgent / Disconnect — tear down when done.
All delegates fire on the game thread from Tick(); it is safe to touch UObjects and UI directly from callbacks.
